productDisplayName: Nike Men Splash  Orange Flip Flops
description: flip flops are always in vogue, wear them to complete a casual outfit or when dressing down for the beach. The nike Splash Thong, true to its name, will add a splash of colour to your feet and life, transporting you to a world of absolute comfort and delight. They have good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any casual outfit. UpperBroad straps for improved comfortSynthetic woven straps for durabilityRubber toe separator for beter gripFoam footbed for all day comfortnike swoosh on the footbedThong construction to hold the forefoot in placeOutsoleHerringbone pattern for good gripSlipper careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
